title: Japanese-Style Crispy Bread Toast
description: A crispy twist on traditional Japanese toast, topped with savory ingredients.
instructions: Cut the crispy bread into 1-inch (2.5 cm) cubes.
In a small bowl, mix together butter, salt, and granulated sugar.
Dip each bread cube into the butter mixture to coat.
Place the coated bread cubes on a baking sheet.
Bake for 5-7 minutes, or until crispy and golden brown.
While the bread is baking, mix the miso paste with a small amount of water to create a smooth paste.
Remove the bread from the oven and let cool for 1-2 minutes.
Drizzle the miso paste over the bread, then sprinkle with sesame seeds if desired.
